evidence: "A must see for film buffs. Excellent acting."
"This movie portrays the true story of a university literature professor that found herself caught in the whirlwind of the 1930s great purge of academics..."
"A typical coming of age story. Nothing more."
"It was a very dull and long film."
"Great acting and direction. All the players act well with the purpose of their given parts."
"The cinematography is wonderful. The ocean shots and close ups of the stars are magnificent."
"I was surprised to learn that she won an Oscar for Darling."
"Giulietta Masina is such an adorable actress. Her facial expressions are hauntingly beautiful..."
"The music was great but the actual storyline was boring."
"The movie follows some of her experiences but sadly skims over a majority of the injustices that she endured."
"A very tragic story about a young naive woman forced into a world of prostitution and pornography..."
"If you like campiness and gossip then this is great Saturday night mindless movie."

summary: The user enjoys drama and historical films with strong acting and direction, but tends to prefer simpler narratives and slower pacing. They have a high sensitivity to production quality and appreciate emotional depth, though they show little loyalty to specific creators.
